name: Time-Limited Share Link
description: Time-limited, auditable share links for information_object records. Anonymous bearer-token access with HMAC-derived URL-safe tokens, optional max-access count, expiry caps, classified-record gating, and admin revocation. Integrates with ahgAuditTrailPlugin and ahgSecurityClearancePlugin.
author: The Archive and Heritage Group (Pty) Ltd

suggests.ahgAuditTrailPlugin: Dual-write of share-link events into the central audit feed
suggests.ahgSecurityClearancePlugin: Clearance gating on issuance for classified records
suggests.ahgVersionControlPlugin: Reuses ClearanceCheck helper for classified-record gating
